sentences.en: The story is less about insects than about how differently people treat time: some hear only the music of today, while others cannot sleep unless tomorrow's cupboard is labeled.
sentences.zh: 这则寓言与其说是写昆虫，不如说是在写人们对待时间的差异：有人只听得见当下的欢歌，有人若不为明天打好清单便难以安眠。

sentences.en: Neither attitude wins every season; summer forgives the singer, but winter bills everyone in the same cold currency.
sentences.zh: 两种态度并非总在每个季节里分出高下：夏天会原谅歌唱者，但冬天向所有人收取同一种严寒的代价。
